description.en: Make this path a hard link to the same file as target. Note The order of arguments (link, target) is the reverse of os.link()’s. Added in version 3.10. Changed in version 3.13: Raises UnsupportedOperation if os.link() is not available. In previous versions, NotImplementedError was raised.

description.en: Return a new path object representing the user’s home directory (as returned by os.path.expanduser() with ~ construct). If the home directory can’t be resolved, RuntimeError is raised. >>> Path.home() PosixPath('/home/antoine') Added in version 3.5.
